description_long: This skateboard features a wide, elongated deck with beveled corners and a smooth, flat surface, finished in a solid teal blue color. The deck is supported by two visible red wheels, one pair on each end, which are slightly protruding beneath the board. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible graphics, logos, or grip tape on the deck. The wheels are round and appear to be of a standard size, suitable for street or park use. The trucks are not distinctly visible, but the wheel placement suggests a standard mounting style. The skateboard's clean and simple appearance makes it suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, skate parks, or garages.
description: A teal blue skateboard with a wide, beveled deck and two pairs of red wheels, featuring a minimalistic and unadorned design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the teal deck and two red wheels underneath.
description_view_1: End view displaying the width and beveled corners of the deck, with wheels barely visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the teal deck and two red wheels.
description_view_3: Opposite end view, highlighting the deck's width and beveled corners, with minimal wheel visibility.
attribute_wheel_type: classic, red, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard mounting, trucks not distinctly visible, no branding or unique features apparent
